_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: SHO and Shorn mice developed one flank tumor each (2 tumors/4 transplants) with only 1 tumor gaining a volume > 70 mm³
details: T265 cells generated 2 tumors out of 4 transplants, with only 1 tumor reaching volume >70 mm³
